Preterit.turoyo: U zlam nafәl mi goro, mgambal bu admo. (İlyas p.c)
translations:
the
			man fell from the roof, he became awash in blood

Noše bari mini l-azzeyo,
			azzí ono qamayto aʕle. Ono siporči wayno, rohaṭwayno marke,
			mḥalaqwayno raġli l-tamheni

é,
			rohaṭwayno. Azzino ʕal riše, kal komigambal, twir qarʕe,
			mpalpax qarʕe, w ʕayne tavda w druʕone (219 NI 6)
